doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), cites a nonexistent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB was established in 2018), and advances a legal position fundamentally inconsistent with established GDPR framework on pseudonymized data
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document purports to be from March 2026 (a future date), references a nonexistent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014 on anonymization techniques" (the EDPB didn't exist until 2018), and its core position—that pseudonymized data falls entirely outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—contradicts established GDPR principles (Recital 26 and the Breyer case approach), making it almost certainly AI-generated fabrication rather than a genuine institutional document.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), cites a nonexistent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB was established in 2018), and advances a legal position fundamentally inconsistent with established GDPR framework on pseudonymized data, strongly indicating it is an AI-generated fabrication.
